title: Saturday morning at six months
description: Single image feed post — quiet portrait of a community member six months into sobriety, captioned with one specific moment that captures what changed.
hook: Saturday mornings used to be the worst day of the week.

cta.text: Drop the most surprising 'small thing' that changed for you

keyMessage: The wins of sobriety look small from the outside.

strategy.keyMessage: The wins of sobriety look small from the outside.
strategy.ctaText: Drop the most surprising 'small thing' that changed for you

creativePlan.hook: Saturday mornings used to be the worst day of the week.

imageSingle.hook: Saturday mornings used to be the worst day of the week.
imageSingle.creativeDirectionNotes: Natural light, kitchen, weekday morning energy. Subject (Marcus, 6 months sober) in pajamas, drinking coffee, laptop closed, phone face-down. We want quiet, not posed. Shot in his actual apartment.
imageSingle.altText: A man in his late 30s in pajamas, sitting at a kitchen counter holding a coffee mug, staring out a window with morning light on his face.
